names.name: Marco
names.origin: Latin, derived from Martius (of Mars the god of war)
names.meaning: Dedicated to Mars, symbolizing strength and warfare

names.name: Giovanni
names.origin: Italian form of Hebrew Yohanan via Latin Ioannes
names.meaning: God is gracious, expressing divine favor

names.name: Antonio
names.origin: Latin Antonius, of uncertain Etruscan or Roman origin

names.name: Giuseppe
names.origin: Italian form of Hebrew Yosef via Latin Josephus
names.meaning: God will increase, expressing prosperity and growth

names.name: Francesco
names.origin: Italian form of Latin Franciscus, meaning of the Franks
names.meaning: Free man, symbol of liberty and virtue

names.name: Luca
names.origin: Latin Lucanus, from Lucania in southern Italy
names.meaning: From Lucania or bringing light and clarity

names.name: Andrea
names.meaning: Strong and manly, representing masculine virtue

names.name: Paolo
names.origin: Italian form of Latin Paulus, meaning small

names.name: Riccardo
names.origin: Germanic Richard via Italian, from ric (ruler) and hard (hardy)
names.meaning: Powerful ruler, symbolizing strength and leadership

names.name: Michele
names.origin: Italian form of Hebrew Michael via Greek
names.meaning: Who is like God, expressing divine power

names.name: Giorgio
names.origin: Italian form of Greek Georgios, from georgos (farmer)
names.meaning: Farmer or earth-worker, symbolizing labor and cultivation

names.name: Matteo
names.origin: Italian form of Hebrew Mattiyahu via Greek Matthaeus
names.meaning: Gift of God, expressing divine blessing

names.name: Davide
names.origin: Italian form of Hebrew David, meaning beloved
names.meaning: Beloved one, expressing affection and favor

names.name: Filippo
names.origin: Italian form of Greek Philippos, from philos (friend) and hippos (horse)
names.meaning: Lover of horses, symbolizing nobility and skill

names.name: Carlo
names.origin: Italian form of Germanic Charles, from carl (man)
names.meaning: Free man or manly person, expressing autonomy

names.name: Vincenzo
names.origin: Italian form of Latin Vincentius, from vincere (to conquer)

names.name: Stefano
names.origin: Italian form of Greek Stephanos, from stephanos (crown)
names.meaning: Crowned one, expressing honor and dignity

names.name: Massimo
names.origin: Italian form of Latin Maximus, meaning greatest
names.meaning: The greatest, symbolizing excellence and superiority

names.name: Fabio
names.origin: Latin Fabius, from faba (bean), name of Roman patrician family
names.meaning: Farmer or of the Fabius clan, expressing cultivation

names.name: Rosa
names.meaning: Rose, symbolizing beauty, love, and purity

names.name: Maria
names.origin: Italian form of Hebrew Miriam via Latin
names.meaning: Of the sea or beloved, expressing grace and mystery

names.name: Anna
names.origin: Italian form of Hebrew Hannah, meaning grace
names.meaning: Grace and favor, symbolizing kindness and blessing

names.name: Francesca
names.origin: Italian feminine form of Francesco, meaning of the Franks
names.meaning: Free woman, expressing liberty and independence

names.name: Caterina
names.origin: Italian form of Greek Katharos via Latin Catharina, meaning pure
names.meaning: Pure and clear, symbolizing virtue and clarity

names.name: Giulia
names.origin: Italian feminine form of Julius, from Latin Iulius
names.meaning: Youthful one, symbolizing vitality and freshness

names.name: Lucia
names.origin: Italian form of Latin Lucia, from lux (light)

names.name: Alessandra
names.origin: Italian feminine form of Alexander, from Greek (defender of men)

names.name: Elisabetta
names.origin: Italian form of Hebrew Elisheba via Greek Elisabeth
names.meaning: God is my oath, expressing divine covenant

names.name: Silvia
names.meaning: Of the forest, symbolizing nature and wilderness

names.name: Martina
names.origin: Italian feminine form of Latin Martinus (of Mars)
names.meaning: Warlike one or dedicated to Mars

names.name: Cristina
names.origin: Italian feminine form of Latin Christinus (of Christ)
names.meaning: Follower of Christ, expressing Christian faith

names.name: Daniela
names.origin: Italian feminine form of Daniel, from Hebrew (God is my judge)
names.meaning: God is my judge, expressing divine justice

names.name: Valentina
names.origin: Italian feminine form of Latin Valentinus, from valens (strong)
names.meaning: Strong and vigorous, symbolizing health and vitality

names.name: Federica
names.origin: Italian feminine form of Germanic Frederick, from frid (peace) and ric (ruler)
names.meaning: Peaceful ruler, symbolizing harmony and leadership

names.name: Veronica
names.origin: Latin name, possibly from vera (true) and icon (image)
names.meaning: True image, referencing Saint Veronica of Christian tradition

names.name: Rafaella
names.origin: Italian feminine form of Hebrew Raphael via Italian (God heals)
names.meaning: God heals, expressing divine healing and wholeness

names.name: Bianca
names.origin: Italian feminine form of Latin Biancus, meaning white
names.meaning: White or pure, symbolizing innocence and clarity

names.name: Leonardo
names.origin: Late Latin Leonardus, from leo (lion) and hardus (hardy)
names.meaning: Bold lion, symbolizing courage and strength

names.name: Tommaso
names.origin: Italian form of Aramaic Thomas, meaning twin
